'''âng-f-n-sh''' ('''kangafneshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yox|yox]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-f-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yox|yox]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-f-n-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kangafneshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingafneshoko|thingafneshoko]] || [[word:jingafneshoko|jingafneshoko]] || [[word:shingafneshoko|shingafneshoko]] || [[word:kingafneshoko|kingafneshoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
